title: corybas praetermissus
intro: Corybas praetermissus, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a rare and endangered terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Corybas praetermissus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and possibly aiding in the treatment of certain skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in salves, creams, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
